name: Raisin Scones
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Butter, cut into pieces (75 g)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cumin and saffron with raisins for a heavenly version of this popular breakfast bread.
2. Steep saffron in lemon juice for 20 minutes.
3. Sift together dry ingredients: baking powder, salt, ground cumin, and sugar.
4. Cut butter into flour coarsely until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
5. Add raisins and orange zest to the flour mixture, mixing well.
6. Mix saffron-infused lemon juice with buttermilk.
7. Combine the wet ingredients with the flour mixture to form a dough.
8. Prepare a floured surface large enough for about a 9-inch circle.
9. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
10. Cut the dough into 8 wedges and transfer onto a greased cookie sheet.
11. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
12. Serve warm.
